menu_items.name: Taster Menu
menu_items.description: Experience the exceptional Taster Menu at Fletcher’s Restaurant, Plymouth. Indulge in a selection of innovative dishes, showcasing locally sourced ingredients and Michelin-recommended culinary artistry.

menu_items.description: Delight in the exquisite A La Carte Menu at Fletcher’s Restaurant, Plymouth. Savour a variety of refined dishes, expertly crafted with the finest seasonal ingredients for an unforgettable dining experience.

menu_items.name: Street Food Menu

restaurant.address: Barbican Leisure Park, Barbican Approach, Plymouth, PL4 0LG

menu_items.name: Spaghetti Bolognese
menu_items.description: Classic spaghetti with a rich Bolognese sauce.

menu_items.name: Margherita Pizza
menu_items.description: Tomato base, mozzarella cheese, and fresh basil.

menu_items.description: Crisp romaine lettuce, croutons, and Caesar dressing.

menu_items.description: Rich chocolate cake served with vanilla ice cream.

menu_items.description: Toasted bread with garlic butter.

menu_items.name: Spicy Kua Kling with Thai-style Fried Egg
Veggie Goodie Bowl
menu_items.description: There’s something so immediately satisfying about eating with your hands and these little nests are best enjoyed without cutlery. Simply wrap the lettuce leaves around the goodies and devour in one mouthful!

menu_items.name: Vegan Pad Thai
menu_items.description: One of our most popular dishes, Pad Thai is always a crowd-pleaser. Not only delicious but surprisingly easy to cook from scratch with our (no longer secret) recipe.

menu_items.name: Pad Kee Mao
menu_items.description: Pad Kee Mao is often known as Drunken Noodles – perhaps because people end up drinking a little more than planned to put out the spicy fire in their mouths!

menu_items.name: Crying Beef
menu_items.description: Our version of the classic Thai dish, which goes by many different names, but is often known as Weeping Tiger, although the only sound you’ll hear while cooking this dish is the delicious sizzle of beef.

menu_items.name: Sausage Roll
menu_items.description: A delicious sausage roll made with seasoned sausage meat wrapped in flaky pastry.

menu_items.name: Vegan Sausage Roll
menu_items.description: A plant-based sausage roll made with a blend of vegetables and spices, wrapped in flaky pastry.

menu_items.name: Steak Bake
menu_items.description: Tender pieces of steak in a rich gravy, encased in a golden puff pastry.

menu_items.name: Chicken Bake
menu_items.description: Juicy chicken and a creamy sauce wrapped in flaky pastry.

menu_items.name: Cheese and Onion Bake
menu_items.description: A delicious combination of cheese and onion in a flaky pastry.

menu_items.name: Bacon Breakfast Roll
menu_items.description: A classic breakfast roll filled with crispy bacon.

menu_items.name: Veggie Breakfast Roll
menu_items.description: A hearty breakfast roll filled with a mix of vegetables and egg.

menu_items.name: Hot Chocolate
menu_items.description: Rich and creamy hot chocolate topped with whipped cream.

menu_items.name: Iced Coffee
menu_items.description: Chilled coffee with a hint of sweetness, perfect for a refreshing drink.

menu_items.name: Lemon Drizzle Cake
menu_items.description: A moist lemon cake drizzled with a sweet lemon icing.

menu_items.name: Chocolate Chip Cookie
menu_items.description: A classic cookie loaded with chocolate chips.
